title: Tropicalia
description: Tropicalia is a mod that adds a more tropical touch to MC, with flora that sell the castaway vibe of the mod.
body:
![Tropicalia](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c03a942b26cdb722888ad98d03e8d06eaf0fe35.png)



# THE WORLD OF TROPICALIA


Welcome to **Tropicalia**, Minecraft's best Tropical-coded mod. The goal of this mod is to build of Minecraft's tropical vibe, building on the existing tropical features in the game, along with adding new ones. Examples of features as of Beta 1 are:

![Palm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b59fe09ae12435c34f2e72969aee3c5da4ffe218.png)

## THE PALM TREE

This tree generates in beaches and deserts, in a not-so-frequent manner. The log has a custom, skinnier model, that resembles the unequalness on a real Palm Tree. The leaves, or the 'crown' have a striking new pattern, and they cover this tree's main feature, aside from the wood set, the--

![Coconut](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1799411619c2ee5a494fe9ce73a5f3b6d5164d6c.png)

## COCONUT

A hard block to break, that eventually grows from Palm Leaves. It can be picked up with silk touch, but its drop is the Filled Cracked Coconut, a very nutritious food. But, the twist, when you consume the Filled Cracked Coconut, you get the Cracked Coconut, which can be crafted into a Throwable Coconut, that launches a coconut projectile that knocks your enemy back and gives a small damage along with it.

![Throwable Coconut](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ad2e88dbf810bd958d0fec086d98144195e73b7.png)

And that's it... So far. This might seem like a small mod, but remember that I am writing this description as of Beta 1, so this is just the beginning, and the mod is still under development as my main focus.
